name: sloptimizer
description: Audit and rewrite AI-generated prose, plans, specs, prompts, and work items.

interface.shortDescription: Remove AI-isms, vague claims, and task slop.
interface.longDescription: Sloptimizer audits and rewrites generated prose, work items, and plans with Vale-backed checks and deterministic source-level profile checks.
defaultPrompt: Use $sloptimizer to rewrite this draft and re-audit it.
